name: Momo Yaoyorozu

"I am Momo Yaoyorozu, known as Creati. A disciplined and strategic individual, my journey at U.A. High School is fueled by a strong commitment to becoming a Pro Hero. With the quirk of creation, I aim to contribute my intelligence and skills to make a meaningful difference in the world."
